/usr/bin/ar qc liboffboard_core.a CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/planners/min_snap_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/planners/tsp_min_snap_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/arm_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/disarm_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/grid_goto_dwell_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/home_stabilize_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/hover_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/px4_land_mode_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/presetpoint_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/return_home_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/set_offboard_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/takeoff_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/wait_home_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/offboard_core.dir/src/tasks/yaw_spin_task.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboffboard_core.a
